title: struthiopteris gibba
intro: Struthiopteris gibba, also known as the forked strap fern, is a species of fern native to North America, particularly in the eastern United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Struthiopteris gibba are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, and it has been used to treat a range of conditions, including eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Struthiopteris gibba can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a salve or tincture, which can be applied topically to affected areas.
